title: NetworkSlice
description: NetworkSlice schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE 5G Managed Services API

slice_id.description: Unique identifier of the network slice.

name.description: Display name of the network slice.

description.description: Description of the slice's purpose or use case.

slice_type.description: 5G slice type based on 3GPP SST values. eMBB for enhanced mobile broadband, URLLC for ultra-reliable low-latency, mMTC for massive machine-type communications.

sd.description: Slice Differentiator hex string for distinguishing slices of the same type.

security_policy_id.description: ID of the security policy applied to this slice.
